config_template.output_tensor: optional preallocated output tensor of shape {DIM}

applicability_notes: Unary elementwise modified Bessel function of the first kind, order 0. Golden function registered as torch.i0. Supports optional preallocated output_tensor and queue_id. Validated in tests over input range [-10, 10] via PCC comparison.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.i0(input_tensor, output_tensor=output_tensor, queue_id=cq_id)
